items.title: Fraud and anomaly scoring
items.description: Labeled historical transactions (fraud / legitimate) train classifiers that score new payments in real time — classic supervised binary classification at scale.

items.title: Demand and revenue forecasting
items.description: Past sales with date, region, and promotion features train regression models that predict future demand — supervised learning on continuous targets.

items.title: Computer vision inspection
items.description: Manufacturing lines label images as defect or pass; CNNs learn visual patterns from (image, label) pairs and gate quality on the production line.

items.title: Natural language classification
items.description: Sentiment analysis, intent detection, and topic tagging train on text–label pairs; transformers fine-tuned with cross-entropy on labeled corpora.

items.title: Recommendation ranking
items.description: User–item interaction logs with click or purchase labels train models to rank candidates — supervised learning where y is engagement or conversion.

items.title: LLM supervised fine-tuning (SFT)
items.description: Curated (prompt, response) datasets fine-tune generative models to follow instructions — the Gen AI application of the same labeled (input, target) paradigm.
